reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 4850.0. 2. SL Dist: 1750.0 (Base 1.8x ATR). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 2.77. 4. Regime: RANGING/MEAN_REVERSION. 5. Logic: Price is currently testing the Value Area High (VAH) at 71,200 following a low-volume grind. The Red Team critique correctly identifies a 'Look Above and Fail' scenario. With the POC at 70,062 acting as a distribution node rather than accumulation, a rotation back to the Value Area Low (VAL) at 65,800 is highly probable. The lack of structural support (liquidity gap) between 68k and 70k suggests that a break below the POC will accelerate the move toward the VAL.
reasoning_zh: 价格目前正在测试 71,200 附近的价值区高点 (VAH)，但 15 分钟图显示成交量萎缩，呈现典型的‘向上突破失败’(Look Above and Fail) 迹象。红队审查指出，70,062 的 POC 更多是派发节点而非吸筹区。在震荡格局 (RANGING) 下，价格极大概率从 VAH 向价值区低点 (VAL) 65,800 附近进行均值回归。由于 68k-70k 之间存在流动性空洞，一旦跌破 POC，下行速度将加快。止损设在 VAH 上方以对冲假突破风险。
